creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 237380
Patch for sox

Since development seems to progress very slowly just follow other distros and update to latest commit (using Gentoo's distfile)
Import fix for vorbis encoder: https://github.com/doremir/sox/commit/d05aba55a86177f7a3d395c7a03c5c4e280b31fb

This also fixes following CVEs:
CVE-2019-13590
CVE-2019-8357
CVE-2019-8356
CVE-2019-8355
CVE-2019-8354
CVE-2017-18189
CVE-2017-15642
CVE-2017-15372
CVE-2017-15371
CVE-2017-15370
CVE-2017-11359
CVE-2017-11358
CVE-2017-11332

I'm not a user of SoX so it's very briefly tested but given that other distributions have imported this version there shouldn't be any major issues.

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

It would also be very nice if we could get mpg123 support imported as it's much faster than mad(lib) and better maintained. https://github.com/doremir/sox/commits/master
